function.name: record_decision
function.description: Write a structured decision record. Call once per asset you evaluated at end of cycle (before turn_complete). Includes the data you saw, the rules applied, and your verdict. Persists 30 days. Cheap; ~200 tokens of overhead per call.

asset_mint.description: Base token mint (44-char base58). Required for asset-level decisions; null for portfolio-level.

phase.description: Which step in the cycle. screen=candidate evaluation by Scout/Hunter. verdict=Argus/Skeptic review. manage=Helm/Hands holding decision. deploy/close/tp/sl=executed actions. skip/veto=rejection.

primary_reason.description: ONE sentence summarizing the deciding factor. Examples: 'TVL $18k below $20k floor', 'PROCEED — fresh pumpfun grad with 91% LP profitable', 'OOR 50 bins above + 3/4 hard degradation triggers'.

data_snapshot.description: The numeric data you saw. Free-form JSON. Include the fields that mattered: tvl, volume_1h, fee_active_tvl_ratio, holders, bot_holders_pct, top10_pct, mcap, organic_score, volatility, price_change_pct_1h, smart_wallets, etc.

rules_evaluated.description: Array of {rule, value, threshold, passed} objects showing which rules you applied.

reasoning_text.description: Optional longer prose explanation. Skip if primary_reason is enough.

function.name: list_decisions
function.description: Query the decision ledger by asset / agent / cycle window / decision type. Returns matching records ordered by ts DESC.

since_minutes_ago.description: Look back N minutes from now

function.name: trace_asset
function.description: Full cross-agent timeline for one asset. Returns every decision any agent ever made about this mint, ordered chronologically. Best for postmortems.

function.name: explain_cycle
function.description: Summarize a single agent cycle: what was evaluated, what decisions fired, where each candidate went. Use cycle_id from a turn_complete event, or 'latest' for the most recent cycle.

function.name: cycle_summary
function.description: Aggregate stats across all agents for a time window. Counts decisions by type, lists assets evaluated, surfaces the most-evaluated and most-rejected mints.
